---
title: "ROOST Simple Report"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Setup
# ---------------------------------------------------------
import yaml
import json
from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

bundle_dir = Path(__file__).parent
meta_path = bundle_dir / "metadata.yaml"

if not meta_path.exists():
    raise RuntimeError(f"metadata.yaml not found in {bundle_dir}")

meta = yaml.safe_load(meta_path.read_text())
runs = meta.get("runs", [])
```

```
rows = []

for run in runs:
    run_path = Path(run["path"])

    trials_dir = run_path / "trials"
    if not trials_dir.exists():
        continue

    for trial_dir in sorted(trials_dir.iterdir()):
        if not trial_dir.is_dir():
            continue

        metrics_files = list(trial_dir.glob("*_metrics.json"))
        if not metrics_files:
            continue

        metrics_file = metrics_files[0]

        try:
            data = json.loads(metrics_file.read_text())
        except Exception:
            continue

        row = {
            "run_path": str(run_path),
            "trial": int(trial_dir.name),
        }

        # timing
        row["elapsed_seconds"] = (
            data.get("timing", {}).get("elapsed_seconds")
        )

        # status
        row["status"] = (
            data.get("run_status", {}).get("status")
        )

        # example financial metric
        row["spending_mean"] = (
            data.get("financial", {})
                .get("spending_summary", {})
                .get("mean")
        )

        rows.append(row)

df = pd.DataFrame(rows)

df.head()

if not df.empty:
    summary = (
        df.groupby("run_path")
        .agg(
            n_trials=("trial", "count"),
            elapsed_mean=("elapsed_seconds", "mean"),
            spending_mean=("spending_mean", "mean"),
        )
        .reset_index()
    )
    summary
else:
    print("No data available")

```
